subject: Two elephants in a swampy forest setting, massive tusks and armored hides prominent, a second elephant visible behind the first
description: Two large elephants occupy the frame in close proximity amid a swamp-forest environment. The foreground elephant is shown in extreme close-up from a slightly low angle, its enormous curved tusks curling toward the viewer and its hide showing a distinctive scaled or plated texture. The head is turned sideways toward hanging moss-covered branches. A second elephant is visible in the mid-right background, similarly tusked and imposing. The palette is cool and muted — grey-green, pale tusk ivory, and mossy tones. The feel is primal and territorial.
foreground: Close-up elephant head with large tusks, scaled hide, reaching toward hanging branches
background: Second elephant visible in swamp-forest, hanging moss, pale sky
emotion: steady, purposeful — calm power rather than aggression
